---
title: ""
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](profile.jpg){.rounded style="width:100%; border-radius: 50%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}
## Clara Brügge

PhD Researcher in Environmental Politics
ETH Zürich

I study climate policy, political economy, and public opinion using survey-experimental methods. My research examines how people perceive and respond to the costs and trade-offs of decarbonization.

[cbrugge@ethz.ch](mailto:cbrugge@ethz.ch) · [GitHub](https://github.com/clbruegge)

:::

::::
